verses.1: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good,
verses.3: Let the house of Aaron now say
verses.4: Now let those who fear the LORD say
verses.5: Out of my distress, I called on the LORD.
verses.6: The LORD is on my side. I will not be afraid.
verses.7: The LORD is on my side among those who help me.
verses.8: It is better to take refuge in the LORD,
verses.9: It is better to take refuge in the LORD,
verses.11: They surrounded me, yes, they surrounded me.
verses.13: You pushed me back hard, to make me fall,
verses.14: The LORD is my strength and song.
verses.15: The voice of rejoicing and salvation is in the tents of the righteous.
verses.16: The right hand of the LORD is exalted!
verses.17: I will not die, but live,
verses.18: The LORD has punished me severely,
verses.19: Open to me the gates of righteousness.
verses.20: This is the gate of the LORD;
verses.21: I will give thanks to you, for you have answered me,
verses.22: The stone which the builders rejected
verses.24: This is the day that the LORD has made.
verses.25: Save us now, we beg you, LORD!
verses.26: Blessed is he who comes in the LORD’s name!
verses.27: The LORD is God, and he has given us light.
verses.28: You are my God, and I will give thanks to you.
verses.29: Oh give thanks to the LORD, for he is good,
